stories.title: Why this will be a World Cup like no other
stories.summary: Welcome to the 2026 World Cup, where everything is bigger and louder than ever before.

stories.title: World Cup predictions: 19 ESPN experts make their ...
stories.summary: It's time for our experts to make their picks for silverware, surprise results and everything in between.

stories.title: Broncos reward Payton with new 5-year contract
stories.summary: The Broncos have signed coach Sean Payton to a new five-year contract that will run through the 2030 season.

stories.title: Knicks fans target Wemby with egg, jeers at hotel
stories.summary: A brutal night for the Spurs' Victor Wembanyama continued after he returned to his hotel, as he was pelted with boos from Knicks fans and nearly hit by a flying egg.

stories.title: Wembanyama, Spurs still resolute after collapse
stories.summary: The Spurs expressed belief Wednesday night after surrendering a 29-point lead to allow the Knicks to make the largest comeback in NBA Finals history.
